resolution: Comprehensive error handling already implemented - includes custom exception classes, severity levels, rollback mechanisms, concurrency control, and detailed logging
title: Missing Error Handling in Ingestion Command
description: The ingestion command lacks comprehensive error handling, particularly in the upsert phase. This could lead to unhandled exceptions and data loss.

root_cause_potential: Missing try-catch blocks in critical ingestion operations
Insufficient error logging during upsert phase
No graceful handling of database upsert failures
Potential data loss during error conditions
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Implement try-catch blocks around critical operations and ensure that errors are logged and handled gracefully

immediate_fixes.action: Add comprehensive try-catch blocks to ingestion pipeline
immediate_fixes.rationale: Prevent data loss and corruption during error conditions

immediate_fixes.action: Implement proper error logging and reporting

immediate_fixes.rationale: Allow system to continue processing despite individual failures

impact_assessment.user_impact: High - Data loss risk during ingestion failures
impact_assessment.functionality_impact: High - Critical ingestion pipeline reliability issue
impact_assessment.urgency: High - Must be resolved for data integrity
